items.name: address-book1
items.title: Address Book 1 - Address book list with edit modes and default selection
items.description: This component provides an interactive interface for managing and editing a list of addresses, allowing users to add, edit, and delete addresses with form inputs for various details like name, street, city, and phone number. It includes features such as marking an address as default, categorizing addresses by type (home, work, other), and toggling between display and edit modes.

It provides options to define addresses as home or work, and features tools to select a default address for streamlined address management.

items.description: A blog grid with page title, subtitle, card links that lead with author and date, then title and summary, plus a mobile-only view-all button.

items.name: blog7
items.title: Blog 7 - Centered blog cards with read-more links
items.description: A centered blog section with secondary badge, large heading, supporting copy, and a responsive grid of image-top cards with linked titles, summaries, and read-more rows.

items.name: blog8
items.title: Blog 8 - Offset blog rows with tags
items.description: A blog section with centered heading and description, then wide stacked rows pairing uppercase tag lines and copy with a bordered image, each with read-more links.

items.name: blogpost1
items.title: Blogpost 1 - Centered article with alert and table
items.description: A single-post layout with centered title, subtitle, author row with avatar and site link, hero media, and prose body including headings, alert, table, and figures.

items.name: blogpost2
items.title: Blogpost 2 - Article with sticky sidebar
items.description: A two-column blog article with a sticky narrow column for back navigation, display title, and avatar byline beside a main column with hero image and full prose.

items.name: blogpost3
items.title: Blogpost 3 - Article layout with sticky nav and promo column
items.description: A long-form article block with a centered masthead, main column with prose sections, alerts and tables, sticky in-page navigation, and a bordered call-to-action aside on large screens.

items.name: blogpost4
items.title: Blogpost 4 - Article with breadcrumbs, share rail, and back to top
items.description: A blog article with breadcrumbs, intro blurb, sectioned prose with alerts and tables, sticky section list, circular social share buttons, and a back-to-top control.

items.name: blogpost5
items.title: Blogpost 5 - Article with bold headline and offset section rail
items.description: A blog post layout with breadcrumbs, oversized headline, hero image, sectioned body with alerts and tables, and a narrow rail for on-page links and share buttons.

items.name: blogpost6
items.title: Blogpost 6 - Article with chapter list and patterned hero
items.description: A blog article with dotted hero background, centered title and share row, sticky chapter list, long-form prose with images, and repeated author card.

items.name: blogpost7
items.title: Blogpost 7 - Blog post layout with animated header
items.description: This component displays a blog post layout with animated transitions for various elements such as the title, author information, and descriptions. It features an image, a publication date, content descriptions, and an author's avatar with details, making it suitable for showcasing articles or stories.

items.name: book-a-demo1
items.title: Book A Demo 1 - Demo booking form with benefits and logos
items.description: This component is designed to facilitate user engagement by providing a form for booking a demo, along with showcasing key benefits and a carousel of company logos. It features input fields for user information and preferences, a select dropdown for source discovery, and incorporates motion effects for enhanced visual presentation.

items.name: book-a-demo2
items.title: Book A Demo 2 - Demo booking with animated testimonials
items.description: This component is a demonstration booking block that includes a contact form, a section for animated testimonials, and a footer highlighting trusted partners or clients. The contact form allows users to enter personal details and company information, while the testimonials section uses animations to display user feedback from various organizations.

items.name: book-a-demo3
items.title: Book A Demo 3 - Demo booking form with testimonial cards
items.description: The component combines a demo booking form with testimonial display functionality, aimed at facilitating user interaction through form inputs such as name, email, location, and more. It features customizable properties for headings, descriptions, and testimonials, making it suitable for user feedback and engagement with multiple selection options.

items.name: careers1

items.description: A careers section with a page heading, supporting copy, and repeating department blocks where each role is a row with title, location, and arrow link animation.

items.description: A careers band with outline badge, title, fallback hiring note, and rows of jobs showing type, city, remote label, and an apply button on a dashed grid background.

items.name: careers3
items.title: Careers 3 - Categorized job openings with badges
items.description: A careers block that prints category badges, then stacked job links with titles, one-line descriptions, map-prefixed locations, and trailing arrows.

items.name: careers4
items.title: Careers 4 - Simple careers heading with category sections
items.description: A minimal careers section with configurable heading and grouped job rows showing title, location, and arrow link per opening.

items.name: careers5
items.title: Careers 5 - Centered careers title with full-width job stack
items.description: A careers section with centered page title and a single-column list of roles showing title link, description, location icon row, and salary text.

items.name: careers6
items.title: Careers 6 - Careers page with stats header and job cards
items.description: A careers block with centered hero copy, quick stats row, and detailed job cards listing department, location, schedule, compensation, experience, and apply actions.

items.name: careers7
items.title: Careers 7 - Grouped careers listings with row actions

items.title: Careers 8 - Filterable open positions by department

items.title: Careers 9 - Careers openings grid with general application link

items.name: case-studies1
items.title: Case Studies 1 - Case study grid with hover image cards
items.description: This component showcases a set of visually engaging case study cards, each with interactive hover effects, designed to highlight how various solutions can enhance business growth and performance. Users can explore different case studies through dynamic imagery, logos, and descriptive text, providing insights into how these offerings can benefit their operations.

items.name: case-studies10
items.title: Case Studies 10 - Masked two-up landscape case study carousel
items.description: Two landscape case study cards visible at once with soft edge fade masks hinting at more content, advancing one card at a time.

items.name: case-studies11

items.description: Static three-column grid of case study cards with portrait imagery, company logos, and titles beneath a centered section heading.

items.name: case-studies12
items.title: Case Studies 12 - Two-by-two case study grid with landscape cards
items.description: A static 2×2 grid of landscape case study cards with logos, titles, descriptions, and read-more links over full-bleed imagery.

items.name: case-studies2
items.title: Case Studies 2 - Case studies with quotes and metrics
items.description: This component displays case studies highlighting user testimonials and key performance metrics such as satisfaction rates and ROI improvement. It features visual and text elements including user quotes, images, and company logos to illustrate the impact and effectiveness of a product or service.

items.name: case-studies3
items.title: Case Studies 3 - Featured case study with supporting grid
items.description: This component displays a curated selection of case studies, featuring a prominent highlighted case study alongside additional entries. It supports customizable data input for logos, companies, tags, titles, and links, allowing users to explore detailed case study content with engaging visuals and interactive elements.

items.name: case-studies4
items.title: Case Studies 4 - Case study spotlight with stats and CTA
items.description: This component displays a case study block highlighting significant improvements and achievements, featuring key statistics, an author profile, and a summary. It includes a call-to-action button that guides users to read the full story, making it useful for showcasing success stories or customer testimonials.

items.name: case-studies5
items.title: Case Studies 5 - Case study carousel with testimonials
items.description: This component is a carousel block that showcases a series of testimonials with accompanying logos and images. It allows users to navigate through different slides, displaying dynamic content and animations for an engaging user experience.

items.name: case-studies6
items.title: Case Studies 6 - Masked case study carousel with logo cards
items.description: A horizontal carousel of case study cards with edge fade masks, company logos, titles over full-bleed imagery, and dot pagination.

items.name: case-studies8
items.title: Case Studies 8 - Three-up case study carousel stepping one at a time
items.description: Case study carousel showing three portrait cards at once on medium screens, advancing one card per step with dot pagination and no edge masks.

items.name: case-studies9
items.title: Case Studies 9 - Two-up landscape case study carousel
items.description: Case study carousel showing two landscape cards side by side, advancing one card at a time with logos, titles, descriptions, and read-more links.

items.name: case-study1
items.title: Case Study 1 - Long-form case study with metrics and sidebar
items.description: This component displays a detailed case study highlighting improvements in system reliability through AI monitoring, featuring key metrics, narrative sections, and visual elements. It also includes breadcrumbs for navigation, alerts for important notes, and buttons for user interactions such as contacting or learning more.

items.name: case-study3
items.title: Case Study 3 - Case study with section navigation and avatars
items.description: This component presents a detailed case study layout, including sections for introduction, problem statement, approach, and outcomes, with navigable headings to guide users through different sections of content. It includes features such as breadcrumbs for navigation, avatar integration for showcasing contributors, and social media sharing options, providing a comprehensive storytelling tool with dynamic content interaction.

items.name: case-study8
items.title: Case Study 8 - Case study article with company sidebar
items.description: The component "CaseStudy8" is designed to present a detailed narrative with accompanying visuals, including an image and structured text sections for titles, paragraphs, and lists. It also incorporates an informational sidebar that displays company-related details such as logo, size, location, and website, offering users comprehensive content and context in one cohesive block.

items.name: checkout1
items.title: Checkout 1 - Accordion checkout with cart and payment steps
items.description: This component is a checkout block that facilitates online purchasing by managing cart items and payment details. It features forms for user information, address, shipping methods, and payment options, integrating an accordion layout for a step-by-step process.

items.name: checkout2
items.title: Checkout 2 - Two-column checkout with cart and address forms
items.description: This component facilitates a comprehensive e-commerce checkout process, allowing users to input contact information, shipping address, choose a shipping method, and select a payment method. It includes an order summary where users can view, modify quantities, and remove items from their shopping cart before finalizing their purchase.

items.name: checkout3
items.title: Checkout 3 - Checkout with collapsible cart and accordion sections
items.description: This component facilitates a comprehensive checkout process, integrating functionalities for managing cart items, collecting contact and address details, and selecting payment and shipping methods. Designed with a flexible schema validation, it supports multiple payment options including credit card and PayPal, and features collapsible sections to streamline the user experience.

items.name: checkout4
items.title: Checkout 4 - Cart review beside payment method selection
items.description: This component serves as a comprehensive checkout block that handles both shopping cart management and payment processing. Users can manage item quantities, view total prices, and choose from multiple payment methods, including credit card and PayPal, while ensuring form validation using Zod and React Hook Form.

items.name: checkout5
items.title: Checkout 5 - Order summary with promo and payment methods
items.description: The component provides a detailed checkout form that includes order summary, email input, card payment details, and promo code application, using react-hook-form and zod for validation. It allows users to input billing information, apply a coupon code, and choose payment methods like card or Apple Pay.

items.name: checkout8
items.title: Checkout 8 - Accordion checkout with cart, addresses, and payment
items.description: This component is a comprehensive checkout form that facilitates the entire purchase process, including cart overview, address entry, and payment methods. It leverages the `react-hook-form` library for form handling and supports multiple payment options such as credit card, PayPal, and bank transfers.

items.name: code-example1
items.title: Code Example 1 - Tabbed database query examples in multiple languages
items.description: This component serves as a versatile code example block that allows users to explore and copy multi-language database query examples, such as JavaScript, Python, Go, and Ruby, with integration for ORMs and raw SQL. It features tabbed navigation to switch between languages, a copy button for ease of use, and displays relevant file names for each example.

items.name: code-example11
items.title: Code Example 11 - Database Examples by Stack
items.description: A centered hero explaining database connectivity, language pickers with logos, framework tabs or a mobile select, sample Postgres-oriented snippets per stack, copy control, and a documentation link.

items.name: code-example14
items.title: Code Example 14 - File Ops Accordion and Code
items.description: A file-management hero with dotted radial backdrop, dual CTAs, accordion rows for create, update, and delete flows, and a synced TypeScript example in a scrollable code block with copy.

items.name: code-example16
items.title: Code Example 16 - Analytics Snippet Modes
items.description: A centered analytics pitch with eyebrow, headline, supporting copy, primary CTA, and a code panel that switches among server, client hook, and React UI examples via tabs or a compact selector.

items.name: code-example2
items.title: Code Example 2 - HTTP request examples with language tabs and copy
items.description: This component provides a visual interface for displaying code examples of HTTP requests in multiple programming languages, including JavaScript, Python, and Go. It features a code block with selectable files, language switching options, and a button for copying code, making it ideal for educational or documentation purposes.

items.name: code-example3
items.title: Code Example 3 - Theme switching hook example with interactive code
items.description: This component showcases the use of custom hooks to manage and toggle themes within a React application. It includes interactive code blocks and provides a clear implementation example, demonstrating how to integrate theme switching with a button and visual indicators.

items.name: code-example4
items.title: Code Example 4 - File tree with selectable code preview
items.description: This component provides an intuitive interface for exploring a file structure with a tree view and examining the content of selected files in a code block. Ideal for users looking to navigate through and interact with code examples effectively, it facilitates seamless file browsing and code inspection within a component library.

items.name: code-example5
items.title: Code Example 5 - API integration snippets with protocol and language tabs
items.description: This component provides a code explorer, allowing users to interactively select and view code examples for different API integrations including REST, GraphQL, and WebSocket. It features language switching tabs, displays code snippets with syntax highlighting, and offers a copy-to-clipboard functionality.

items.name: code-example6
items.title: Code Example 6 - Selectable Hook Snippets
items.description: A marketing section with a headline, three selectable snippet cards for debounce, local storage, and fetch hooks, a syntax-highlighted code block with copy control, and an outline CTA.

items.description: This component allows users to compare multiple products side-by-side by displaying their specifications and key features in a tabular format. It includes interactive elements such as badges, pricing details, product ratings, and an option to directly add items to the cart.

items.name: compare-products2

items.description: This component, "CompareProducts2," is designed for comparing multiple products with specific characteristics and specifications presented in a tabular format. It allows users to view product images, prices, ratings, and additional product details, facilitating easy comparison and decision-making.

It includes detailed descriptions of features and displays certification status badges, making it ideal for highlighting compliance and technical capabilities.

items.name: download1
items.title: Download 1 - App store download cards
items.description: A muted section with a centered headline and blurb, then three cards for desktop, iOS, and Android with icons, platform copy, a download button, and store badge images.

items.description: A center hero headline and supporting paragraph lead into three bordered columns for desktop buttons, mobile store badges in a grid, and compact outline buttons labeled with browser icons.

items.name: download11

items.name: download13
items.title: Download 13 - Compact desktop download card with copy-to-clipboard
items.description: This component provides a user interface for downloading a desktop application, featuring functionalities like copying installation commands and selecting specific download versions for Windows. It includes buttons for direct downloading and a visual indication of successful clipboard operations.

items.name: download2
items.title: Download 2 - Minimal three-column downloads
items.description: A softer muted backdrop with a centered title and intro, then three equal columns for desktop, iOS, and Android with large round icons, short copy, and badges or a download button.

items.name: download22
items.title: Download 22 - Split Mobile Download Columns
items.description: A bold headline with two muted panels for iOS and Android, each with store badges, short copy, layered placeholders, and a phone mockup.

items.name: download3
items.title: Download 3 - Single-file desktop download card
items.description: A narrow centered column with logo, title, and intro, then a card showing version, size, checklisted requirements, primary and outline actions, trial line, and a trust line below.

items.name: download4
items.title: Download 4 - Split download card with feature icons
items.description: A secondary badge and centered headline introduce a large card that pairs a feature list with rotating icons against a bordered download column showing version, size, and stacked buttons.

items.name: download5
items.title: Download 5 - Multi-OS download with snippets
items.description: A product tile and dated title head a grid of Linux snippets, macOS architecture tabs with download rows, a Windows waitlist button, separators, and legal copy.

items.name: download6

items.name: download7
items.title: Download 7 - App store promotion with phone mockups
items.description: Centered marketing band with outline badge, bold balanced headline, App Store and Google Play image links, and three phone frames that resize and reorder across breakpoints.

items.name: download8
items.title: Download 8 - Centered download hub with platform matrix
items.description: Client download section with a square glare-framed product visual, large product title, primary auto-detect button, last-updated line, and a bordered two-column table of platform rows with small outline actions.

items.name: download9
items.title: Download 9 - Split software pitch with platform availability strip
items.description: A two-column software block with headline, muted intro, checkmarked feature lines, paired Buy and Download buttons, a bordered product image, then a labeled icon row for many platforms and browsers.

items.name: ecommerce-footer1
items.title: Ecommerce Footer 1 - Ecommerce footer with newsletter, language selector, and contact row
items.description: This component serves as a comprehensive footer block featuring a newsletter subscription form, a multilingual section for various language selections, and contact information including social media links. It includes customizable sections for footer links, enabling users to provide important information such as policies and collections, enhancing navigation and connectivity options for the user.

items.name: ecommerce-footer18
items.title: Ecommerce Footer 18 - Accordion ecommerce footer with newsletter form and contact blocks
items.description: This component is designed for creating a customizable footer section with multiple sections such as contact information, social media links, shop categories, and support resources, organized in an accordion layout to enhance user interaction. It includes a newsletter subscription form, language selection, payment method icons, and a logo display, providing comprehensive footer functionality for user engagement and navigation.

items.name: ecommerce-footer19
items.title: Ecommerce Footer 19 - Ecommerce footer with support info row, accordion links, and brand panel
items.description: This component provides a comprehensive footer block for digital platforms, featuring sections for a newsletter subscription, contact information, and footer navigation links. It includes integrated social media links and payment method icons, offering a versatile foundation for enhancing user engagement and site navigation.

items.name: ecommerce-footer2
items.title: Ecommerce Footer 2 - Accordion ecommerce footer with newsletter strip and social icons
items.description: This component is a footer block designed for webpage applications, featuring sections for newsletter subscriptions, navigational footer links, and social media icons. It includes form validation using a schema to ensure proper email input and utilizes an accordion layout for organized display of various informational links.

items.name: ecommerce-footer20
items.title: Ecommerce Footer 20 - Accordion ecommerce footer with brand story panel and payment icons
items.description: This component is a versatile and interactive footer block designed to enhance user engagement through features like a newsletter subscription form and social media links. It organizes helpful site links, payment methods, and additional footer information, making it a comprehensive footer solution for any web application.

items.name: ecommerce-footer9
items.title: Ecommerce Footer 9 - Ecommerce footer with store list, link columns, app badges, and payments
items.description: This component serves as a detailed footer block that includes sections for store locations, company information, social media, app promotion, and payment methods. It features links to various store addresses, provides company policies and help topics, showcases social media icons, encourages app downloads, and displays supported payment options.

items.name: feature161
items.title: Feature 161 - Bordered grid with logos rail
items.description: Two-pane grid wrapped in muted hairlines and corner ticks, pairing bold headline plus paired Shadcn UI buttons with a horizontal trio of monochrome logos bordered by divider rails.

items.name: feature162
items.title: Feature 162 - Bento feature stack with rounded media
items.description: A feature section with a top row of lead copy beside a large image inside one bordered panel, and a lower two-cell row pairing stacked text and media with a second full-bleed image.

items.name: feature163
items.title: Feature 163 - Four-cell marketing grid with spanning columns
items.description: Four bordered feature cells on a responsive grid that use three- and two-column spans on large screens, each pairing a bold line and body copy with a corner-rounded image.

items.name: feature164
items.title: Feature 164 - Tabbed square media beside headline and CTA
items.description: Two-column feature strip with tabs driving square rounded images and pill triggers on one side, and a large heading, supporting paragraph, and Learn more button on the other.

items.name: feature166
items.title: Feature 166 - Centered intro over four-panel feature matrix
items.description: Centered title and muted intro precede a bordered two-by-two matrix of four prop-driven features, each with heading, description, and image in alternating three-fifths and two-fifths column widths.

items.name: feature167
items.title: Feature 167 - Vertical feature tabs with gradient active rule
items.description: Outline badge, large balanced headline, and intro precede a split layout where stacked tab triggers with icons and copy face a tall image region that cross-fades between three productivity topics.

items.name: feature168
items.title: Feature 168 - Three-up feature rail with framed media wells
items.description: Bordered rail around a hero band with outline badge, very large heading, and muted intro, then a three-column grid of feature cells split by one-pixel gaps with images padded inside muted wells.

items.name: feature169
items.title: Feature 169 - Line tabs over wide bordered screenshots
items.description: Outline badge, headline, and supporting copy introduce a three-trigger tab strip with circular icon chips and gradient active rules, each selection revealing a wide rounded image with a light border.

items.name: feature17
items.title: Feature 17 - Six-up icon grid with centered intro
items.description: Optional secondary badge and large centered heading introduce up to six icon-led features in two columns, each with accent circle, title, and muted body, plus an optional large primary link button.

items.name: feature170
items.title: Feature 170 - Icon values strip with text link
items.description: Outline heart badge, large heading, muted description, and an underlined primary text link with arrow precede a responsive grid capped at three icon-led feature rows.

items.name: feature171
items.title: Feature 171 - Dashed rails linking horizontal feature cards
items.description: Muted section with dashed horizontal rule and centered mono label, two-column heading and intro, and one Card containing three image-forward tiles separated by dashed vertical or horizontal dividers and arrow links.

items.name: feature172
items.title: Feature 172 - Two-row grid with dashed dividers
items.description: A centered headline anchors a stacked layout: two feature columns above, three below, separated by dashed rules with inset screenshots or multi-logo clusters.

items.name: feature173
items.title: Feature 173 - Three metric panels with humorous stats
items.description: A two-column header leads into three oversized stat cards showing values, cheeky metric labels with outline icons, soft vertical gradients, muted footnote, and responsive grid tightening.

items.name: feature174
items.title: Feature 174 - Muted bento grid with soft image fades
items.description: Centered section title over a five-tile bento on a muted field; each shadcn Card blends inline title and description with a screenshot that fades at one or more edges.

items.name: feature175
items.title: Feature 175 - Vertical tabs with large preview pane
items.description: Intro row then a bordered region: vertical tab triggers with icons and blurbs swap a three-column-wide panel showing headline, body, and full-width preview image.

items.name: feature176
items.title: Feature 176 - Two-pane analytics vignette with chart
items.description: Layered dotted grid backdrop frames two columns of shadcn cards: evaluation story with badges, progress, skeletons, and outline actions beside a stacked bar chart and three KPI tiles.

items.name: feature18
items.title: Feature 18 - Icon-led feature cards up to six
items.description: Left-aligned headline over a responsive grid (up to three columns on large screens) of bordered cards, each showing a custom icon, title, muted body, and optional Learn more affordance.

items.name: feature180
items.title: Feature 180 - With and without comparison columns
items.description: Centered pitch with outline badge and intro copy, then two parallel columns listing pain points versus wins, each row pairing an outline icon with a short line and contrasting surface treatment.

items.name: feature181
items.title: Feature 181 - Four numbered columns with timed badges
items.description: Left header and pill-shaped primary action above four vertical tracks, each oversized faded step numeral, feature title and copy, outline badge pairing clock icon with a duration label.

items.name: feature182
items.title: Feature 182 - Three image tiles with dual actions
items.description: Centered heading and paired primary and outline buttons lead into three equal cards: landscape image, title, muted description, and small bordered icon tile.

items.name: feature183
items.title: Feature 183 - Device-stage hero with overlay cards and stats
items.description: Rounded muted stage with faint line grid anchors a centered phone mock flanked by floating product cards plus selects, followed by three large typographic KPI summaries laid out horizontally on wide screens.

items.name: feature184
items.title: Feature 184 - Tabbed features with image and stacked triggers
items.description: A centered heading leads into a two-column area where a large image tracks the active tab and vertical tab triggers show icons, titles, and short copy, with paired primary and outline buttons below.

items.name: feature186
items.title: Feature 186 - Feature tabs with patterned background and mobile dots
items.description: A feature-tabs section with a tiled pattern backdrop, horizontal tab triggers, a wide content panel that shows an icon, title, body copy, and image, plus ghost dot buttons on small screens for picking a tab.

items.name: feature187
items.title: Feature 187 - Three-step process with connector line
items.description: A feature-timeline section with a large title and intro, then three columns on wide screens where numbered circular markers and titles pair with descriptions, linked by a horizontal or vertical connector line.

items.name: feature188
items.title: Feature 188 - Bordered resource rows with thumbnails
items.description: A centered section title introduces a rounded bordered stack of linked rows; each row pairs a circular arrow affordance, title and description, and a landscape thumbnail on wide layouts.

items.name: feature189
items.title: Feature 189 - Split feature list with layered images
items.description: A two-column feature section pairs a collage of three tilted overlapping images on one side with a headline, three stacked feature blurbs, and a secondary CTA with trailing arrow on the other.

items.name: feature19
items.title: Feature 19 - Centered tabs with slide detail and checklist
items.description: A centered intro leads into horizontal shadcn tabs; each pane is a two-column layout with headline, body copy, two-column checklist with check icons, outline CTA, and a rounded image that orders first on mobile.

items.name: feature190
items.title: Feature 190 - Dense feature grid with square thumbnails
items.description: A centered heading and intro sit above a responsive grid of compact Card rows pairing a linked square thumbnail with title and short description, plus a secondary button centered beneath the grid.

items.name: feature191
items.title: Feature 191 - Feature grid with step badges on accent
items.description: An accented feature section with outline badge and headline, then three cards each showing a mono step label, title, body copy, and a bordered image.

items.name: feature192
items.title: Feature 192 - Accordion features with desktop image sync
items.description: Inside a rounded gradient-framed panel, an accordion lists feature titles and long descriptions; a large image beside it on medium and up reflects the open item, with the image inlined under each item on small screens.

items.name: feature193
items.title: Feature 193 - Asymmetric bento cards with mixed layouts

items.name: feature194
items.title: Feature 194 - Icon feature cards with learn-more buttons
items.description: A centered mono label, heading, and supporting line introduce a grid of up to four shadcn Cards showing an icon, short description, and full-width outline learn-more link with chevron affordance.

items.name: feature197
items.title: Feature 197 - Feature accordion with paired image panel
items.description: A two-column section built around an accordion that switches feature copy and updates the large preview image beside the list.

items.name: feature198
items.title: Feature 198 - Three icon cards on staggered rows
items.description: Three feature cards with icons, titles, and blurbs sit in an offset grid so the row heights vary for a slightly asymmetric scan path.

items.name: feature199
items.title: Feature 199 - Scroll-linked feature list with sticky media
items.description: A wide text column lists feature entries while a separate column shows a large image that tracks which row is active as the user scrolls or hovers.

items.name: feature2
items.title: Feature 2 - Split feature row with image and dual actions
items.description: A two-column block with one column for media and the other for a heading, supporting paragraph, and paired primary and secondary buttons.

items.name: feature20
items.title: Feature 20 - Utility grid with header and learn-more link
items.description: A section header with a title and inline text link sits above introductory copy in two columns and a responsive grid of image-backed utility cards.

items.name: feature200
items.title: Feature 200 - Three gradient panels with icon feature lists
items.description: Three equal-width columns each carry a tinted gradient panel, an icon, a title, and a vertical checklist of short sub-points for side-by-side comparison.

items.name: feature202
items.title: Feature 202 - Bento grid of image-backed solution tiles
items.description: A centered heading introduces a mosaic grid of cards with photos, icons, headings, and blurbs; one wide tile spans two columns in the pattern.

items.name: feature203
items.title: Feature 203 - Four feature cards with checklist rows
items.description: Four cards in a two-column grid each show an icon, title, description, and a checklist with small separators between rows.

items.name: feature204
items.title: Feature 204 - Split visuals with icon-tagged lines and CTA
items.description: One column shows a large image or collage while the other stacks a heading, icon-labeled benefit lines, supporting copy, and one primary button.

items.name: feature205
items.title: Feature 205 - Tabbed feature panel with stats over imagery

items.name: feature206
items.title: Feature 206 - Centered header with bento image and text tiles
items.description: A centered outline badge, headline, and intro lead into a bento grid that alternates square photos with rounded text panels, scaling from two columns on medium screens to four on extra-large.

items.name: feature207
items.title: Feature 207 - Numbered three-step workflow with separators

items.name: feature209
items.title: Feature 209 - Split gallery with thumbnails and cross-fade preview
items.description: A bordered split section with headline, clickable thumbnail strip, outline button, and a tall main image that cross-fades on selection, sitting over a subtle repeating pattern on the media side.

items.name: feature21
items.title: Feature 21 - Two-column grid of utility cards

items.name: feature210
items.title: Feature 210 - Icon-led feature links in a responsive grid

items.name: feature211
items.title: Feature 211 - Rounded tab strip with variant media layouts
items.description: Muted rounded panel holds pill-style tabs in a horizontal scroller, then pairs serif headlines, primary icon tiles, summaries, and optional primary buttons with image layouts that change per tab.

items.name: feature213
items.title: Feature 213 - Vertical tabs with sixteen-by-nine imagery

items.name: feature214

items.description: Centered serif title and subcopy lead into a shadcn/ui carousel of tall muted cards; each card shows a muted video that plays on hover, a corner icon chip, title, description, and link.

items.name: feature215
items.title: Feature 215 - Centered headline carousel with aspect-ratio video cards
items.description: Bold centered heading and muted intro precede a carousel of cards where each slide wraps a sixteen-by-nine muted video, overlapping icon badge, title, summary, and shared prev or next controls centered below.

items.name: feature215a
items.title: Feature215a - Responsive video cards in a centered grid

items.name: feature215b
items.title: Feature215b - Stacked rows with side-by-side video and copy
items.description: Centered intro leads into full-width rows where each pairs a video thumbnail with icon, title, summary, and a small outline action.

items.name: feature216
items.title: Feature 216 - Icon tabs with large photo and round step controls

items.name: feature217
items.title: Feature 217 - Accessibility story with hero image and icon columns

items.name: feature217a
items.title: Feature217a - Centered hero band over three accessibility columns

items.name: feature217b
items.title: Feature217b - Frosted accessibility tiles on photo backdrop

items.name: feature218
items.title: Feature 218 - Split upgrade column with soft-fade photo edge
items.description: Top-level headline spans the section, then a roughly one-third text column with long-form copy and an outline action faces a wide square photo whose right side dissolves into the background.

items.name: feature219
items.title: Feature 219 - Patterned feature columns with three image layouts

items.name: feature22

items.name: feature220
items.title: Feature 220 - Split stats column with muted autoplay video

items.name: feature220a
items.title: Feature220a - Centered section with video and stats

items.name: feature220b
items.title: Feature220b - Stats row with split video and copy
items.description: Three headline statistics in a centered row above a two-column grid with a muted video on one side and a headline, paragraph, and CTA on the other over a dotted background.

items.name: feature221

items.description: Header row with left-aligned headline, supporting copy, and a pill CTA leads into a responsive two-column card grid where each tile has a badge, body text, gradient dot, and a rounded Learn More control.

items.name: feature222
items.title: Feature 222 - Image-forward cards with stat pairs

items.name: feature224
items.title: Feature 224 - Carousel of photo cards with dual icons

items.name: feature225

items.description: Centered headline and muted lead-in introduce a tab-driven layout where a responsive grid of clickable cards shows icons and blurbs, and the active selection reveals a wide preview image below.

items.name: feature227

items.name: feature228
items.title: Feature 228 - Smart home story with icon grid and gallery
items.description: Muted two-column section pairs a large stacked headline, intro copy, and a small icon-led benefit grid with a collage of rounded product photos inside framed phone-style shells.

items.name: feature229
items.title: Feature 229 - Three pillars with icon headers and checklists

items.name: feature23
items.title: Feature 23 - Centered header with three image cards

items.name: feature230
items.title: Feature 230 - Wide hero image with split headline and icons
items.description: A marketing feature band with a full-width image strip, eyebrow divider, oversized headline plus supporting paragraph, and four Lucide-backed feature tiles in a responsive grid.

items.name: feature231
items.title: Feature 231 - Numbered feature cards with split headline

items.name: feature234
items.title: Feature 234 - Centered headline with fanned image cards

items.name: feature235

items.name: feature237

items.name: feature238
items.title: Feature 238 - Giant headline with layered browser cards
items.description: A centered marketing feature with eyebrow icon label, towering headline, muted intro, signup button beside text demo link with chevron drift, and three stacked faux browser cards animated with Motion.

items.name: feature239
items.title: Feature 239 - Split feature with dotted frame and image tile
items.description: A bordered inset layout pairing outline badge headline body and outlined button opposite a dotted-frame media tile with dated overlay headline gradient wash and chevron teaser link.

items.name: feature24

items.description: A slim feature strip with icon label row, learn-more link, separator, split headline and body columns, and a wide rounded banner image on Shadcn layout utilities.

items.name: feature240

items.description: A Services heading over a looping Shadcn carousel of tall dotted-frame image cards with date lines, titles, copy, peeking slides on wide layouts, and prev or next controls.

items.name: feature241

items.name: feature242
items.title: Feature 242 - Testimonial carousel with slide controls

items.name: feature243
items.title: Feature 243 - Vertical step timeline with cards

items.name: feature244
items.title: Feature 244 - Feature carousel with dotted card frames

items.name: feature245
items.title: Feature 245 - Two-column feature list with center image

items.name: feature246
items.title: Feature 246 - Email signup panel with benefit checklist

items.name: feature247
items.title: Feature 247 - Centered scroll-driven text reveal

items.name: feature248
items.title: Feature 248 - Full-width dark panel with text reveal

items.name: feature249
items.title: Feature 249 - Aurora headline with scroll-scaled media card
items.description: A stacked section with gradient-styled headline text, supporting copy, and a scroll-driven card that scales and shifts above a large image or preview.

items.name: feature25
items.title: Feature 25 - Three feature bands with checkmark grids
items.description: A long-form feature section with a small badge, headline, then three separated bands of copy, each with a title and a four-column grid of checkmarked items.

items.name: feature250
items.title: Feature 250 - Animated network illustration with linked CPU nodes
items.description: A feature section with a heading, body copy, and an illustration of CPU nodes linked by animated beams that stacks or widens with the viewport.

items.name: feature251
items.title: Feature 251 - Four feature cards with globe and animated beams
items.description: A feature grid of four cards with icons and copy, a globe visualization, and animated beams that link the cards in a responsive layout.

items.name: feature252
items.title: Feature 252 - Ripple panel with dashed border and primary CTA

items.name: feature253
items.title: Feature 253 - Split feature with globe and animated arrow button
items.description: A two-column feature with heading, body, and CTA beside a globe graphic; the button icon rotates on hover for extra motion.

items.name: feature254
items.title: Feature 254 - Orbiting avatar rings with center headline and CTA

items.name: feature255

items.name: feature256

items.description: Two stacked bands: a responsive grid of tool cards with logos and spotlight hover, then a guides list with titles and descriptions in one or two columns.

items.name: feature257

items.description: A showcase of tools grouped by category, with larger hero tiles for highlighted items and a denser grid for the rest, plus spotlight-style hover feedback.

items.name: feature26
items.title: Feature 26 - Six-up icon grid with section badge
items.description: A feature overview with an optional badge, heading, and six icon-led items in a responsive grid up to three columns, each with title and copy.

items.name: feature261

items.name: feature266

items.name: feature267

items.description: A two-column marketing slice pairs a kicker with icon, large heading, muted paragraph, and pill email field with a subscribe button beside a continuous 3D image marquee.

items.name: feature268
items.title: Feature 268 - Split feature with checklist and tilted 3D card

items.name: feature269

items.name: feature27
items.title: Feature 27 - Overview band with two-up media and full-width row
items.description: An outline badge tops a centered heading and paragraph, followed by a two-up grid of bordered images with captions and a full-width media row spanning both columns below.

items.name: feature270
items.title: Feature 270 - Three tilted panels with alternating image stacks
items.description: A heading and muted intro lead into three tall link panels that flip image and text order per item, each using perspective tilt and animated hover markers.

items.name: feature271

items.description: A viewport-tall aurora animation sits behind a centered shadcn/ui badge, display heading, labeled divider, and two-column checklist of twelve short feature titles with badge icons.

items.name: feature272
items.title: Feature 272 - Dark three-step row with arrows and beams
items.description: A dark, centered how-to band introduces a kicker, large title, and paragraph above three bordered cells with arrow chips between them over animated background beams.

items.name: feature274
items.title: Feature 274 - Metrics grid with canvas hover reveals
items.description: A centered heading and supporting paragraph introduce four tall stat tiles; hovering a tile plays a canvas particle field and swaps large numbers for paired labels like success rate or active users.

items.name: feature275
items.title: Feature 275 - Three canvas cards with step reveal copy
items.description: Centered title and intro text sit above three rounded tiles that show large step numerals at rest and, on hover, canvas animation with titles, descriptions, and radial shading.

items.name: feature276
items.title: Feature 276 - Feature grid with shared hover highlight
items.description: A centered feature section with label, headline, intro, and up to six icon cards in a responsive grid where hover animates a shared muted highlight behind the active card.

items.name: feature277

items.description: A centered feature section with label, headline, intro, and up to four cards with icons, body text, and Read More buttons; hover adds a tinted rounded backdrop per card.

items.name: feature278

items.description: A tall muted section with a centered headline and up to six icon cards in a responsive grid; each card shows a colored rounded fill on hover and no separate section intro line.

items.name: feature28
items.title: Feature 28 - Two-column image pairs with learn more links
items.description: Two equal stacks of framed aspect-ratio images, headings, supporting text, optional badges, and Learn more links with chevrons, arranged side by side on large screens.

items.name: feature280
items.title: Feature 280 - Checklist and testimonial card stack
items.description: A split row pairs a large heading, labeled feature checklist with check icons, and a horizontally divided list against a stacked deck of testimonial cards with inline emphasized phrases.

items.name: feature281
items.title: Feature 281 - Centered testimonial stack with read more

items.name: feature282

items.description: A two-column section with a primary-bordered panel housing an interactive hover-to-encrypt style card and captions opposite long security copy and a short dot-led bullet list.

items.name: feature283

items.name: feature284

items.name: feature285

items.description: This component is designed to display a user's order history, providing details such as order number, date, total amount, and status of each item. It features a search functionality allowing users to filter orders by number or item name, and offers options to view invoices, archive orders, or purchase items again.

items.name: order-history4
items.title: Order History 4
items.description: This component displays a list of user orders with functionalities for searching, viewing details, and tracking the status of each order. It provides an interactive interface to filter orders by search query, view order items with details, and navigate through the order status timeline.

items.name: order-history5
items.title: Order History 5
items.description: This component allows users to view, filter, and search through their order history, providing details such as order date, number, status, and items. Users can track shipments, initiate returns, and access additional order details, enhancing order management and accessibility.

items.name: order-summary1
items.title: Order Summary 1
items.description: This component displays a detailed order summary, including order information, itemized lists of products, billing and shipping details, and a payment method overview. It features interactive elements like tracking orders, downloading receipts, and printing order documents, enhancing user engagement and utility.

items.name: order-summary2
items.title: Order Summary 2
items.description: This component displays a comprehensive order summary, including order details, itemized lists, payment method, and shipping information. Users can easily track their orders and access options to download a receipt or print the summary.

items.name: order-summary3
items.title: Order Summary 3
items.description: This component displays a detailed summary of an order, including information about the order number, date, delivery details, payment method, and itemized list with images and prices. Additionally, it features sections for shipping address, order total breakdown, and action buttons for tracking the order or continuing shopping.

items.name: order-summary4
items.title: Order Summary 4
items.description: This component is designed to display a comprehensive order summary, including order details, timeline tracking, payment information, and shipping address, enhancing the user experience by providing a clear overview of their purchase. It allows users to interact with various elements such as timeline steps and provides progress visualization, making it easier to track the order's status and history.

items.name: order-summary5
items.title: Order Summary 5
items.description: This component displays an order summary with detailed information about ordered items, pricing, and estimated delivery dates, allowing users to view, track orders, and continue shopping. It features interactive elements like buttons to toggle the display and manage actions, as well as formatted pricing details for enhanced user experience.

items.name: order-summary6
items.title: Order Summary 6
items.description: This component is designed to display an order confirmation dialog, highlighting key details such as order number, estimated delivery date, itemized products with images, quantities, and prices. It also features a summary of the order costs including subtotal, shipping, and total, with options to track the order or continue shopping.

items.name: payment-methods1
items.title: Payment Methods 1
items.description: This component allows users to manage their payment methods by adding, editing, and deleting various payment options, such as Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal. It features a user-friendly interface with the ability to designate a default payment method and view associated details like the last four digits of a card number or the linked email for PayPal accounts.

items.name: payment-methods2
items.title: Payment Methods 2
items.description: This component allows users to manage payment methods, supporting actions such as adding, editing, and removing cards or PayPal accounts. It features a user-friendly interface for setting a default payment method and includes a visual grid layout for displaying current payment methods with logos.

items.name: payment-methods3
items.title: Payment Methods 3
items.description: This component allows users to manage their payment methods, including viewing, editing, or adding new credit card information. It provides functionalities such as setting a default card, editing card details, and securely displaying card information with interactive elements.

items.name: payment-methods4
items.title: Payment Methods 4
items.description: This component allows users to view and manage a list of payment methods, providing functionalities to edit card details and set a default card using a carousel interface. Users can add new cards and are assured that payment information is stored securely.

items.description: This component displays a list of customer reviews, providing a summary of average ratings, a distribution of ratings, and individual review details including the author, date, and content. It features elements like avatars, badges for verified reviews, and rating bars to visually represent the feedback statistics.

items.name: reviews23
items.title: Reviews 23
items.description: The component displays a carousel of product reviews, each featuring an author's avatar, comment, and associated product details such as image and name. It includes carousel navigation controls to scroll through the reviews and highlights verified buyers, making it ideal for showcasing customer feedback on products interactively.

items.name: reviews3
items.title: Reviews 3
items.description: This component presents user reviews with features that include displaying the reviewer's name, avatar, review content, rating, and images. It also allows users to mark reviews as helpful and provides a button to write a new review.

items.name: reviews4
items.title: Reviews 4
items.description: This component displays a collection of user reviews with features including average rating calculation, review filtering by star rating, and visual representation of rating distribution. Users can see detailed information about each review, such as the content, author, and date, with the option to filter and clear selected ratings.

items.name: reviews5
items.title: Reviews 5
items.description: This component displays a list of customer reviews with features like sorting options by helpfulness, date, and rating, and includes visual elements such as avatars, ratings, and progress bars for rating distribution. It provides an interactive user interface where users can view detailed customer feedback and load additional reviews.

items.name: reviews6
items.title: Reviews 6
items.description: This component is designed to display a carousel of customer reviews, highlighting feedback on various products including product details such as name, image, price, and a link. Users can interact with the carousel to navigate through different reviews, and the component includes dynamic elements like product rating, customer comments, and author attribution.

items.name: reviews8
items.title: Reviews 8
items.description: This component provides a review carousel functionality, allowing users to scroll through and view customer reviews, both text-based and image-supported, with ratings and author details. Ideal for showcasing testimonials or product feedback, the block includes navigational buttons for smooth scrolling and individual indicators for easy selection.

items.name: reviews9
items.title: Reviews 9
items.description: This component displays a carousel of user reviews, featuring ratings, comments, authors, dates, and associated images. It's designed to easily integrate user feedback into applications, providing an interactive way to showcase testimonials.

items.description: A full-screen shader background that cycles between two images with lens distortion and bubble transition, configurable transition and pause duration.

items.description: A full-screen shader background with a raymarched 3D grid scene, configurable base, accent, and glow colors, vignette, and time-based camera motion.

items.name: shader13

items.description: A full-screen shader background with fluid, organic shapes driven by sine and cosine distortion, single configurable color, and time-based animation.

items.name: shader14

items.description: A two-pass shader background with simplex noise distortion, flowing organic pattern, and a second pass that renders the result as character-based dither blocks.

items.description: A full-screen shader background with RGB prism effect, color acts as spectral mask, configurable color and time multiplier.

items.description: A full-screen shader background with falling pixel-art invaders, expanding rings, configurable color, and time multiplier.

items.name: shader17
items.title: Shader 17 - Fluid Reveal Image
items.description: A full-screen WebGL background that layers a real-time fluid simulation over a loaded image, driven by pointer movement and a configurable fluid tint color.

items.name: shader18
items.title: Shader 18 - Texture Flame Shader
items.description: A full-screen fragment shader background using four tiled noise textures, a warm flame-style color ramp, parabolic silhouettes, and adjustable warp and edge controls.

items.name: shader19
items.title: Shader 19 - Refraction Noise Shader
items.description: A full-screen shader background with glass rod refraction, 3D noise, RGB dispersion, and configurable background and object colors.

items.name: shader2
items.title: Shader 2 - Kaleidoscope Swirl Shader
items.description: A full-screen shader background with kaleidoscope-style rotating shapes, fractal-like patterns, configurable color, and time-based animation.

items.name: shader20
items.title: Shader 20 - Metaball Glass Shader
items.description: A full-screen shader background with glass rod refraction, two metaballs, configurable metaball and background colors.

items.name: shader3
items.title: Shader 3 - Mouse-Interactive Glass Shader
items.description: A full-screen shader background with glass refraction, circular shapes, mouse-following interaction, and configurable color.

items.name: shader4
items.title: Shader 4 - Chromatic Aberration Shader
items.description: A full-screen shader background with chromatic aberration, procedural organic scene, light streaks, and dark color palette.

items.name: shader5
items.title: Shader 5 - Raymarched Gyroid Sphere
items.description: A full-screen shader background with raymarched gyroid surface and sphere, neon volumetric lighting, and blue noise dither.

items.name: shader6
items.title: Shader 6 - Dithered Wave Shader
items.description: A full-screen shader background with cosine wave pattern, Bayer dither, and configurable foreground and background colors.

items.name: shader7
items.title: Shader 7 - Fluid Vector Field Shader
items.description: A full-screen shader background with fluid simulation, vector field visualization, arrow patterns, mouse interaction, and configurable color.

items.name: shader8

items.description: A full-screen shader background with ping-pong buffer, grid-based shapes (squares, crosses, lines), and mouse interaction.

items.name: shader9

items.description: A full-screen shader background with raymarched 3D torus, glow effect, mouse proximity highlight (red), and dark color palette.

items.name: shopping-cart1
items.title: Shopping Cart 1
items.description: This component, named "ShoppingCart1," provides a user interface for displaying and managing items in a shopping cart. It supports functionality like removing items, viewing the item list with images, and calculating the total cost dynamically.

items.name: shopping-cart14
items.title: Shopping Cart 14
items.description: This component provides a comprehensive shopping cart interface, allowing users to view, modify, and manage items in their cart, such as adjusting quantities and removing products. It features integration with form handling to calculate the total price dynamically and supports easy navigation for cart and checkout actions.

items.name: shopping-cart15
items.title: Shopping Cart 15
items.description: This component manages a shopping cart, showcasing items with functionalities for quantity management, item removal, variant selection, and promotional code application. It displays either an empty cart message or a detailed list of products, including variants and pricing, to facilitate user interactions and order adjustments.

items.name: shopping-cart16
items.title: Shopping Cart 16
items.description: The component is a dynamic and interactive shopping cart block that allows users to manage items in their cart, update item quantities, and view suggested products. It features functionalities like displaying product details, calculating totals, applying discounts, and incorporates carousel and collapsible elements for enhanced user interaction.

items.name: shopping-cart17
items.title: Shopping Cart 17
items.description: This component provides an interactive shopping cart experience with features like displaying cart items, allowing quantity adjustments, and updating the total price dynamically. It includes functionality for handling empty cart states and adding promotional codes to enhance user engagement and purchase potential.

items.name: shopping-cart18
items.title: Shopping Cart 18
items.description: This component provides a dynamic shopping cart interface with functionalities to view, update item quantities, and remove items, along with calculating and displaying the subtotal. It utilizes a popover for cart interactions and includes visual elements for item display, quantity management, and checkout options.

items.name: shopping-cart19
items.title: Shopping Cart 19
items.description: This component provides an interactive shopping cart interface allowing users to manage and adjust item quantities, apply promo codes, and view subtotal costs with progress towards free shipping. It also suggests upsell products and provides a checkout feature, all contained within a collapsible interface.

items.name: shopping-cart2
items.title: Shopping Cart 2
items.description: This component provides a detailed shopping cart interface where users can view, modify, and manage their selected items, including options to adjust quantities or remove items. It also features an order summary with subtotal, shipping costs, and total price calculations, allowing users to seamlessly proceed to checkout.

items.name: shopping-cart20
items.title: Shopping Cart 20
items.description: The ShoppingCart20 component provides an interactive shopping cart interface, allowing users to view, modify, and manage items directly from a pop-up interface. Key features include displaying items with images, adjusting item quantities, calculating subtotals, and offering express checkout options with payment integrations like Apple Pay and PayPal.

items.name: shopping-cart3
items.title: Shopping Cart 3
items.description: This component is a dynamic shopping cart block that allows users to manage items, update quantities, and apply promotional codes. It includes features such as order summary, item removal, subtotal calculation, and trust badges for secure checkout, making it a comprehensive solution for handling online purchases.

items.name: shopping-cart7
items.title: Shopping Cart 7
items.description: This component provides a dynamic shopping cart interface, allowing users to view, update quantities, and remove products with real-time price calculation. It integrates form management via react-hook-form to handle cart item data and user interactions efficiently.

items.name: todo1
items.title: Todo 1
items.description: This component is a simple interactive Todo List that allows users to track tasks by toggling their completion status with visual feedback. It features task titles displayed with checkboxes, enabling users to easily mark tasks as complete or incomplete.

items.name: todo10
items.title: Todo 10
items.description: This component is a task management block that allows users to manage, organize, and prioritize tasks along with subtasks by their due dates, projects, and priorities. It features drag-and-drop functionality, task sorting, filtering options, and the ability for users to add, update, delete, and toggle task completion and star status for easy organization and tracking.

items.name: todo2
items.title: Todo 2
items.description: This component provides a drag-and-drop to-do list allowing users to reorder tasks using a grip handle and toggle their completion status. It utilizes the `@dnd-kit` library to manage drag-and-drop interactions and supports keyboard and pointer sensors for accessibility and ease of use.

items.name: todo3
items.title: Todo 3
items.description: This component allows users to manage a to-do list, featuring drag-and-drop reordering of tasks, completion toggles, and organization of tasks into active and collapsible completed sections. It includes interactive elements such as draggable icons, checkboxes, and animation effects to enhance user interaction while managing tasks.

items.name: todo4
items.title: Todo 4
items.description: This component is a drag-and-drop task management block that allows users to create, reorder, and mark tasks as completed. It features interactive elements such as add and cancel buttons, an input field for task titles, and visual indicators for task status.

items.name: todo5
items.title: Todo 5
items.description: This component provides a dynamic and interactive to-do list that supports creating, reordering, editing, and deleting tasks with a user-friendly drag-and-drop interface. It features task management capabilities, including toggling task completion status, with easy access to edit or delete actions through a dropdown menu.

items.name: todo6
items.title: Todo 6
items.description: This component provides a drag-and-drop-enabled to-do list, allowing users to create, reorder, filter, and sort tasks by priority or title. It features interactive elements for task management, such as checkboxes to mark completion, dropdowns for filtering by priority or starred status, and buttons to add new tasks.

items.name: todo7
items.title: Todo 7
items.description: This component provides an advanced to-do list management system, allowing users to create tasks with options for setting dates, priorities, reminders, and associating tasks with specific projects. It includes features like drag-and-drop reordering, filtering, and sorting tasks by different criteria, enhancing task organization and productivity.

items.name: todo8
items.title: Todo 8
items.description: This component provides a dynamic to-do list with features for managing tasks and subtasks, allowing users to expand, reorder, and track progress with drag-and-drop functionality. Users can mark tasks and subtasks as completed and add new subtasks with ease, enabling efficient task management and prioritization.

items.name: todo9
items.title: Todo 9
items.description: This component provides a dynamic to-do list with features for real-time search, tag management, and task reordering via drag-and-drop functionality. Users can add or remove multiple tags per task, filter tasks based on tags, and utilize a search function to quickly locate tasks.

items.name: trust-strip1
items.title: Trust Strip 1
items.description: This component displays a set of trust indicators, each with an icon, a title, and an optional description, such as "Free Shipping" and "Secure Payment." It can be customized with different trust items and styled with additional CSS classes.

items.name: trust-strip2
items.title: Trust Strip 2
items.description: This component displays a trust indicator block that highlights a star rating, the number of customer reviews, and the total customer count, making it ideal for showcasing user feedback and credibility. Additionally, it includes recognitions from well-known press logos to further reinforce trust and social proof.

items.name: trust-strip3
items.title: Trust Strip 3
items.description: This component displays a list of certifications and guarantees, providing visual icons and descriptions for each to convey trust and authenticity. It allows customization by accepting optional props for different certifications, guarantees, and additional styling through the `className` prop.

items.name: trust-strip4
items.title: Trust Strip 4
items.description: This component displays trust indicators including a star rating with verified review count, feature icons with descriptions for services like free shipping and 24/7 support, and a verified seller badge. It is designed to enhance user trust and credibility perception by highlighting key benefits and seller authenticity.
